title: PPIP - Setting persistence when Share Data toggle is OFF
scenario: Verify that the Share Data toggle remains persistently OFF after restarting the app when the user has set it to OFF.
steps: 1. Start app fresh, go through onboarding, tap 'Continue as Guest'.
2. On iOS, select any option on the location permission screen (not part of this test).
3. Go to App Settings > General > Account and confirm the Share Data toggle is OFF with the correct description.
4. Restart the app and go to App Settings > General > Account again to verify the toggle is still OFF.
expected: The Share Data toggle remains persistently OFF after restarting the app when the user has set it to OFF.
